  math helpers
    1) adds numbers
    2) subtracts numbers

  0 passing (10ms)
  2 failing

  1) math helpers
       adds numbers:
     AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Expected values to be strictly equal:

      4 !== 3

      at Context.<anonymous> (test/math.spec.js:7:12)

  2) math helpers
       subtracts numbers:
     AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: Expected values to be strictly equal:

      0 !== 1

      at Context.<anonymous> (test/math.spec.js:12:12)
